security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: asset: https://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://api.deepseek.com https://api.openai.com https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com http://localhost:11434

bundle.longDescription: openDB is a lightweight, open-source database management tool with AI assistance. Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, MSSQL, GaussDB and more.
